# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: ["https://example.com", "https://anotherdomain.com"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      headers: ["Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Requested-With"]
      credentials: true
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names: ["apikey"]
      hide_credentials: true
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      policy: "local"
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"

services:
  - name: my-service
    url: "http://my-service.local"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: ["https://example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST"]
          headers: ["Authorization", "Content-Type"]
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names: ["apikey"]
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          policy: "local"
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: my-route
    paths: ["/api"]
    service: my-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: ["https://example.com"]
          methods: ["GET"]
          headers: ["Authorization"]
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names: ["apikey"]
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 20
          policy: "local"
        enabled: true
